title: 🔥市场结构极端分化
body: 市场处于存量资金博弈的吸血阶段。BTC.D录得60.1%，处于近四年高位区，表明资金高度集中于比特币。伴随Aave缩减预算等利空，避险情绪升温导致资金从公链及DeFi板块流出，加剧了二八分化。在主导率未跌破58%前，山寨难有独立行情。中性。流动性枯竭将持续吗？
body_en: The market is currently in a liquidity-siphoning phase. BTC.D has hit 60.1%, a four-year high, signaling that capital is hyper-concentrated in Bitcoin. With risk-off sentiment rising due to headwinds like Aave’s budget cuts, funds are flowing out of L1s and DeFi, exacerbating the structural divergence. We won't see any independent alt rallies until dominance drops below 58%. Neutral. Will the liquidity drought persist?
